content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:ReturnOfTheJediPoster1983.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] released in May 1983.]]

A list of events in '''1983''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 8|08]] – [[Juan Frigeri]] is born.
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 70|''Star Wars'' (1977) 70]] published.
*[[January 24|24]] – ''[[Doom Mission]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 165|''Star Wars Monthly'' 165]] published.

==February==
*[[February 12|12]] – [[Josef Altin]] is born.
*12 – [[Iko Uwais]] is born.
*[[February 14|14]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' (radio)]] premiers: "[[Freedom's Winter]]" aired on [[National Public Radio|NPR]].
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 71|''Star Wars'' (1977) 71]] published.
*[[February 20|20]] – [[Bronson Webb]] is born.
*[[February 21|21]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[The Coming Storm]]" aired on NPR.
*[[February 28|28]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[A Question of Survival]]" aired on NPR.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 166|''Star Wars Monthly'' 166]] published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Lupita Nyong'o]] is born.
*[[March 7|07]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[Fire and Ice]]" aired on NPR.
*[[March 14|14]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[The Millennium Falcon Pursuit]]" aired on NPR.
*[[March 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 72|''Star Wars'' (1977) 72]] published.
*[[March 21|21]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[Way of the Jedi (episode)|Way of the Jedi]]" aired on NPR.
*[[March 28|28]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[New Allies, New Enemies]]" aired on NPR.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 167|''Star Wars Monthly'' 167]] published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – [[Matt Lanter]] is born.
*[[April 4|04]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[Dark Lord's Fury]]" aired on NPR.
*[[April 10|10]] – [[Jamie Chung]] is born.
*[[April 11|11]] – ''The Empire Strikes Back:'' "[[Gambler's Choice]]" aired on NPR.
*[[April 12|12]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 73|''Star Wars'' (1977) 73]] published.
*[[April 18|18]] – ''[[Race for Survival]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*18 – [[Disney Channel]] is launched.
*18 – ''The Empire Strikes Back'' (radio) concludes: "[[The Clash of Lightsabers]]" aired on NPR.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 168|''Star Wars Monthly'' 168]] published.

==May==
*[[May 5|05]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Arcade Game]]'' is released by [[Atari]].
*[[May 12|12]] – [[Domhnall Gleeson]] is born.
*12 – [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars'' Episode VI: ''Return of the Jedi'' novelization]] published.
*[[May 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 74|''Star Wars'' (1977) 74]] published.
*[[May 25|25]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode VI''' '''''Return of the Jedi''''']] released.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 169|''Star Wars Monthly'' 169]] published.

==June==
*[[June 12|12]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' published.
*12 – [[The Ewoks Join the Fight (storybook)|''The Ewoks Join the Fight'']] published.
*[[June 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 75|''Star Wars'' (1977) 75]] published.
*[[June 16|16]] – [[Olivia Hack]] is born.
*[[June 17|17]] – [[Kamil Lemieszewski]] is born.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 1|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 1]] published.
*[[June 29|29]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 2|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 2]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 170|''Star Wars Monthly'' 170]] published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Adam Howden]] is born.
*[[July 7|07]] – [[Renée Ahdieh]] is born.
*07 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 3|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 3]] published.
*[[July 11|11]] – ''[[The Paradise Detour]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[July 13|13]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 4|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 4]] published.
*[[July 19|19]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 76|''Star Wars'' (1977) 76]] published.
*[[July 20|20]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 5|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 5]] published.
*[[July 22|22]] – [[Polygon Pictures, Inc.]] is founded.
*[[July 27|27]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 6|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 6]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 171|''Star Wars Monthly'' 171]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: The Arcade Game]]'' released in arcades.

==August==
*[[August 3|03]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 7|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 7]] published.
*[[August 10|10]] – [[Bonnie Maree Piesse]] is born.
*10 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 8|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 8]] published.
*[[August 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 77|''Star Wars'' (1977) 77]] published.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 9|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 9]] published.
*[[August 24|24]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 10|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 10]] published.
*[[August 30|30]] – [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]] published.
*[[August 31|31]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 11|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 11]] published.

==September==
*[[September 7|07]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 12|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 12]] published.
*[[September 12|12]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]'' published.
*[[September 13|13]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 78|''Star Wars'' (1977) 78]] published.
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 13|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 13]] published.
*[[September 21|21]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 14|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 14]] published.
*[[September 25|25]] – [[Donald Glover]] is born.
*[[September 28|28]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 15|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 15]] published.

==October==
*[[October 3|03]] – ''[[A New Beginning]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[October 5|05]] – [[Noah Segan]] is born.
*05 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 16|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 16]] published.
*[[October 12|12]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 17|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 17]] published.
*[[October 17|17]] – [[Felicity Jones]] is born.
*[[October 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 79|''Star Wars'' (1977) 79]] published.
*[[October 19|19]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 18|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 18]] published.
*[[October 26|26]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 19|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 19]] published.
*?? – [[Return of the Jedi 1|''Return of the Jedi'' 1]] published.

==November==
*[[November 2|02]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 20|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 20]] published.
*[[November 9|09]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 21|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 21]] published.
*[[November 12|12]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' published.
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' (1977) 80]] published.
*[[November 16|16]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 22|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 22]] published.
*[[November 19|19]] – [[Adam Driver]] is born.
*[[November 23|23]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 23|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 23]] published.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Emun Elliott]] is born.
*[[November 30|30]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 24|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 24]] published.
*?? – [[Return of the Jedi 2|''Return of the Jedi'' 2]] published.

==December==
*[[December 3|03]] – ''[[From Star Wars to Jedi: The Making of a Saga]]'' aired.
*[[December 7|07]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 25|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 25]] published.
*[[December 13|13]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 81|''Star Wars'' (1977) 81]] published.
*[[December 14|14]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 26|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 26]] published.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 27|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 27]] published.
*[[December 26|26]] – ''[[Showdown]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[December 28|28]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 28|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 28]] published.
*?? – [[Return of the Jedi 3|''Return of the Jedi'' 3]] published.

==Unknown==
*''[[The Ewoks Save the Day]]'' published.
*[[Joe Van Moyland]] is born.
*''[[Rebel Mission to Ord Mantell]]'' released.
*[[Sabaa Tahir]] is born.
*[[Studio Fun International]] is founded.
*''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi: Death Star Battle]]'' released.
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Arena]]'' released.
*''[[The Star Wars Book of Masks]]'' published.
*Publication of ''[[Stjärnornas krig]]'' begins.

==Miscellaneous==
*Kenner releases the following action figures:
**[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]
**[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] ([[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knight Outfit)
**[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]]
**[[Quarren/Legends|Squid Head]]
**[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] Guard
**[[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]]
**[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] ([[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] Disguise)
**[[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]]
**Chief [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]]
**[[Logray/Legends|Logray]]
**[[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]]
**[[Scout trooper/Legends|Biker Scout]]
**[[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Madine]]
**[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] ([[Skiff/Legends|Skiff]] Guard Disguise)
**[[Ree-Yees/Legends|Ree-Yees]]
**[[Wooof/Legends|Klaatu]]
**[[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel Commando]]
**[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] and [[Salacious B. Crumb/Legends|Salacious B. Crumb]] (Packed together with the Jabba The Hutt Action Playset)

----
